sentences.english: We played hide and seek at the park after school.
I hid behind a big tree and nobody could find me.
sentences.korean: 큰 나무 뒤에 숨었는데 아무도 나를 찾지 못했어요.

sentences.english: I waited for a very long time.
Then I realized everyone had gone home without me.
sentences.korean: 그때 모두가 나 없이 집에 갔다는 걸 깨달았어요.

sentences.english: I was too good at hiding!
sentences.korean: 숨는 걸 너무 잘 한 거예요!

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
